title: nepeta sahandica
intro: Nepeta sahandica, also known as SaHANDICA Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Nepeta sahandica include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
